Title: Cosmic Canvas — Live Space Telescope Wallpaper
Desc: Auto-updating 4K imagery from NASA, ESA, ISRO and JAXA space telescopes with interactive cursor effects: parallax drift, stardust trails, click ripples and constellation sketching. Images refresh daily via the bundled fetcher.
Author: Sidharth Asthana
License: Code MIT. Imagery courtesy NASA, ESA/Hubble, ESA/Webb, ISRO, JAXA — credits shown per image.
